info.title: BetMasApi
info.description: API for Beta maṣāḥəft: Manuscripts of Ethiopia and Eritrea. Generated from the existing RESTXQ (%rest:*) annotations in local/ and specifications/ as a first step towards migrating this app to the eXist-db 'roaster' OpenAPI router.

get.summary: given an institution or place id checks the marc records from Vatican Library for relevant related data
given a role, search other attestations of it and print the persName around them and related infos
given the id of a manuscript returns the word count for eventual transcriptions of that work in the given witness
gets the formatted content of an addition in an item, given the id of the file and that of the addition item
given a id returns the attestations and cooccurring entities
returns a JSON object with the aligned known clavis ids
returns a JSON object with the aligned known clavis ids
Main access point to DTS style API returning passages from text
annotations main collection, returns a list of collections of annotations, one for each resource type and one for all items in the db with indexable terms

annotations collection for a type of items (manuscripts, works or narrative units), returns a list of collections of annotations, one for which available index types 'persons', 'places','keywords', 'loci', 'works' if there are all indexable terms for that index, from items in that resources collection. An additiona Annotation Collaction for each item is added whcih is instead an annotation collection of annotation collections.

annotations collection for a type of items (manuscripts, works or narrative units), and a specific item in that collection of resources. Returns a collection of annotation collections if available annotations are present in the item for each type 'persons', 'places','keywords', 'loci', 'works'.

annotations collection for a type of items (manuscripts, works or narrative units), and a specific item in that collection of resources and a specific index type among 'persons', 'places','keywords', 'loci', 'works'. The annotations in the single reference annotation collation are retrieved by adding an $id parameter with the full reference.

annotations collection for a type of items (manuscripts, works or narrative units), and a specific index type among 'persons', 'places','keywords', 'loci', 'works' and 'items'. Indexed passages are grouped by their reference and one annotation collection with that id is provided. the annotations in the single reference annotation collation are retrieved by adding an $id parameter with the full reference
dts/collection https://github.com/distributed-text-services/specifications/blob/master/Collection-Endpoint.md
bespoke json format, former dts proposal draft, returns a list
dts/navigation https://github.com/distributed-text-services/specifications/blob/master/Navigation-Endpoint.md
returns the lines of the second level of subdivision (subchapters) e.g. XXX. 2, 4 XXX. 2, 4-7
returns the lines of the second level of subdivision (chapters)
returns the lines of the first level of subdivision (chapters)
not being sure about what to do with the URI templates in the documentation draft, the templates answer to this call, and can be thus retrived
retrives a single part of a tei file, e.g. a single node

returns an object which includes an array of objects with data about persons to which in some resource a specific role has been assigned, for each id, canonical title and the list of resources for which he/she covers such role, are given.

returns an object which includes an array of objects with data about persons to which in some resource a specific role has been assigned, for each id, canonical title and the list of resources for which he/she covers such role, are given.
returns a map containing the KWIC hits from the evaluation of an xpath containing lucene full text index queries for the API search.
returns a json object with an array of object one for each resource in the specified repository with id and title
returns a xml fragment with the element in a resource which has the given anchor
given the file id, returns the source TEI xml
given a passage in a text, search places where this passage has been quoted
returns a json object containing the hits from the evaluation of an xpath containing lucene full text index queries for the API search.
gets an array of objects in JSON, containing the id and title of resources in the db which have the same keywords or value for a typed element.
transforms into string text a single part of a tei file, e.g. a single node which contains many references to persons, places etc.
The following function retrive the text of the selected work and returns it with basic informations for next and following into a small XML tree
returns the lines of the second level of subdivision (subchapters)
returns the lines of the first level subdivision
retrives a single part of a tei file, e.g. a single node
returns a json object with an array of object one for each resource in the specified collection
returns a json object with an array of object one for each resource in the specified collection
returns the relation element with the author attribution

400.description: No attribution info found for the given id

get.summary: given the file id, returns the source TEI in a json serialization
given the file id, returns the source TEI xml
given the file id, returns the main title
given the file id, returns the main title
given the file id and an anchor, returns the formatted main title and the title of the reffered section
retrives a single part of a tei file given a URI as formatted in the RDF, e.g. a single node
Main access point to DTS style API returning passages from text
